Interface IMultidimensionalDefinition2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to the MultidimensionalDefinition Interface.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("472DD2CD-C4E8-48E9-90A2-FBCC22BEC75C")]
public interface IMultidimensionalDefinition2
